title: Describe a process
subtitle: Explain how something works.
overview: A2 process description uses se + verb and sequence.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Then the sentence is listened to.
Al final se repite en voz alta.
In the end it is repeated aloud.

items.es: Primero se elige una lección corta.
items.en: First a short lesson is chosen.

items.es: Después se leen los ejemplos con calma.
items.en: Then the examples are read calmly.

items.es: Luego se escucha cada frase varias veces.
items.en: Then each sentence is listened to several times.

items.es: Al final se repite la frase sin mirar.
items.en: In the end the sentence is repeated without looking.

items.es: Así se mejora la pronunciación poco a poco.
items.en: This way pronunciation improves little by little.
